name: User Story
description: Captures a requirement from a user's perspective using the classic user story format.

role.name: Role
role.hint: Who is this user? e.g. registered user, admin

capability.name: Capability
capability.hint: What does the user want to do? e.g. to reset my password

benefit.name: Benefit
benefit.hint: Why does the user want this? e.g. I can regain access without contacting support

with-benefit.name: With benefit
with-benefit.description: A user story with a role, capability, and benefit (the classic three-part format).
with-benefit.example: As a registered user, I want to reset my password, so that I can regain access without contacting support.

without-benefit.name: Without benefit
without-benefit.description: A shorter user story with just a role and capability.
without-benefit.example: As a registered user, I want to reset my password.
